summary: Iteration 29 — Tested all 6 user-requested fixes. Backend: 14/14 new tests + 32/32 regression tests pass. UI: Task 1 commitment persistence with values 3/5 verified (saved & reloaded). Task 2 mobile responsive at 360x740 — zero horizontal overflow on home, commitment, peer-review tabs, and landing page. Task 5 holiday manager card visible to admin under الإدارة → إدارة الحسابات with date picker + reason input + 'تعطيل الأسبوع' button. Task 6 admin sees a Trash2 button with data-testid=delete-warning-<id> in StudentCommitmentSection (verified in code + backend DELETE endpoint returns 200/403/404 correctly). Task 4 direction radios (dir-from-start, dir-from-end) + smart-suggest-btn present in WeeklyPlanBuilder (verified in code); backend test confirms direction=from_end yields suggestion starting at الناس and direction=from_start yields suggestion starting at الفاتحة. Task 3 PDF/profile rating now expressed as Math.round(avg/4*100)+'%' (verified in generateStudentReport.js:551 and StudentProfileModal.jsx:288-297).
critical_code_review_comments: TeacherDashboard.js is 749 lines and densely-packed — consider splitting Admin subtabs into smaller components for readability. Not a blocker.
GET /api/student/commitment response wraps payload under {commitment:{...}}; the test handles both shapes — keep the wrapper consistent across endpoints to avoid future ambiguity.

Direction radio cards (WeeklyPlanBuilder.jsx) — consider showing a brief tooltip/helper-text explaining what 'from الناس' means for first-time teachers, especially since memorization-direction can have permanent effects on plan generation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Task 1 persistence, Task 2 mobile overflow=0, Task 5 holiday card visible)

test_credentials: Admin m0m0077100@gmail.com/admin_test_123, Student A test_dialog_user@test.com/test123456 — already in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Task 6 backend test seeds one warning + temporarily freezes the student, deletes via API, then verifies auto-unfreeze (warn_count<3). Original frozen state is restored in finally block. Cleanup uses TEST_ prefix for warning_ids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 29 fixes verified. Use test_iter29_fixes.py as regression for future iterations. Key endpoints: PUT /api/student/commitment, POST /api/teacher/weekly-plans/suggest {direction:'from_end'|'from_start'}, GET/POST/DELETE /api/admin/commitment-holidays(/{id}), DELETE /api/admin/student-warnings/{id}. The students-of-week subtab under الإدارة only shows the 2 currently-chosen students of the week — to open StudentProfileModal for arbitrary students, use admin subtab-overview which lists bookings_by_teacher (each row has profile-btn-<student_id>). For UI verification of the direction radios + delete-warning button, use a student who currently has a booking AND existing warnings (osama38os8@gmail.com or Test Dialog User during a week they have a session).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs; iteration 29 features all working as designed.
